final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: logo-brand → movie-poster-design
Asset type: theatrical movie poster, vertical 2:3 crop, main visual key art
Primary request: sci-fi thriller movie poster featuring a half-human half-mechanical face, AI awakening theme
Scene/backdrop: vast digital matrix space, endless green cascading code rain falling from above, deep dark void
Subject: androgynous female figure, left half — delicate human female face with warm brown human eye; right half — exposed intricate circuit boards, metallic skeleton framework, glowing blue mechanical eye; both halves seamlessly blended at the vertical centerline with a precise fusion transition
Style/medium: photorealistic digital compositing, cyberpunk aesthetic, cinematic key art illustration
Composition/framing: vertical center composition, subject occupies upper two-thirds of frame, lower one-third reserved as title text area, direct eye contact with viewer, slight low-angle to maximize visual impact
Lighting/mood: cold blue rim light on human side, electric green ambient glow from matrix background, hard specular highlights on metal and circuit surfaces, tense and suspenseful atmosphere
Color palette: dominant cold blue and matrix green, dark near-black background, warm brown iris on human eye as contrast accent, glowing cyan-blue mechanical eye
Materials/textures: realistic human skin pores and fine hair strands on left half, brushed titanium, etched copper circuit traces, solder points, fiber-optic filaments on right half
Constraints: perfect symmetrical split exactly at vertical centerline; human eye must be brown; mechanical eye must emit blue glow; lower third must remain visually clear for title typography placement; subject gazes directly at viewer
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, soft or blurry mechanical parts, over-saturated neon without depth, cluttered lower title zone, watermark
